meaning: vt.澶氫粯(閽辫储)vi.浠樺緱杩囧
examples: The scheme will overpay some lawyers and underpay others.
Management has to make sure it does not overpay its staff.
Let somebody else overpay for them.
Why overpay for what someone else has built when you can control your own destiny?
Like many before it, Preussag would rather overpay than be leapfrogged by an arch-rival.
